initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a_has_f.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS percentage_without_fluorine
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id
    FROM atom
    WHERE element = 'F'
) a_has_f ON m.molecule_id = a_has_f.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Cl' OR a.element = 'Br' OR a.element = 'I' OR a.element = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element != 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN ('C', 'H', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'F', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- assuming these are the relevant elements for carcinogenic molecules
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM atom a2 
    WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND a2.element IN ('C', 'H', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- at least one non-fluorine atom
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a2.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'F') f_mols
RIGHT JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'C' AND molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'N' OR element = 'O' OR element = 'S')) c_nos_mols
    ON f_mols.molecule_id = c_nos_mols.molecule_id
JOIN 
    atom a1 ON c_nos_mols.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN 
    atom a2 ON c_nos_mols.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id AND a2.element = 'F'
WHERE 
    a1.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a_has_f.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS percentage_no_fluorine
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id
    FROM atom
    WHERE element = 'F'
) a_has_f ON m.molecule_id = a_has_f.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P' OR a.element = 'Cl' OR a.element = 'Br' OR a.element = 'I' OR a.element = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    molecule m
LEFT JOIN 
    atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND a.element = 'F'
WHERE 
    m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
        FROM atom 
        WHERE element = 'C' OR element = 'N' OR element = 'O' OR element = 'S' OR element = 'P' OR element = 'Cl' OR element = 'Br' OR element = 'I'
    )
    AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
        FROM atom 
        WHERE element = 'F'
    )

JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM atom a2 
    WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND a2.element IN ('C', 'H', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I') -- at least one non-fluorine atom
);
